docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORDYN CHRISTOPHER CHRISTO IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRISTO, JORDYN CHRISTOPHER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,720.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TEGSCO LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHRISTO, JORDYN CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $120.00 SERVED APR-11-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHRISTO, JORDYN CHRISTOPHER
